description: The hotel is switching to a new local bakery for its morning pastries and needs to set them up as a vendor.

nodes.task_description: Collect the new vendor's information, including their business license and payment details.

expected_outcome.expected: All required vendor documentation is collected.

nodes.task_description: Create a new vendor profile in the accounting system.

expected_outcome.expected: The new vendor is successfully added to the system.

nodes.task_description: Set up a recurring purchase order for daily pastry delivery.

expected_outcome.expected: A recurring PO is created to automate future ordering.
